TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Raka ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku,, kwara sali buwan nya ga 26 buwan, 76 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 69 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raka hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Raka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raka hya' ga Tkasan. tay mkyahu' na Raka hya' ga Qphay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku,, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa tkas~ɕan. taj mkjaħuʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa qpħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Raka ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku,, kwara sali buwan nya ga 26 buwan, 76 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 69 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Raka hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Raka hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Raka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Raka hya' ga Tkasan. tay mkyahu' na Raka hya' ga Qphay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku,, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa tkas~ɕan. taj mkjaħuʔ na raka ħjaʔ ɣa qpħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
